description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish that triggers on push events with tags matching v*. Run a job on an ubuntu-18.04 environment to publish a package on PyPI. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.7 on a x64 architecture, installs wheel, builds packages using setup.py, and publishes the distribution to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action with a token from secrets.
